name: prforge-local-watch
description: Watches local PRForge repo/session state: git drift, dirty worktree, review updates, test status, approval integrity, branch upstream, hook health, context pressure. Runs on every PRForge session.

name: prforge-mesh-worker-watch
description: Watches Redis for jobs assigned to this worker instance. Emits a full action directive when a new job arrives — no polling needed by the instance.

name: prforge-mesh-coordinator-watch
description: Watches Redis for submission_ready jobs that passed peer review and need coordinator final approval. Pings the coordinator instance only when approval is needed.
